site.name: DevRelJam
site.tagline: Where Developer Relations professionals jam, learn, and level up together.
site.description: DevRelJams are first-of-its-kind meetups for experienced DevRel practitioners to exchange wins and missteps, and deepen the craft of developer advocacy, community, and engagement.

seo.defaultTitle: DevRelJam | DevRel Meetups Around Global Tech Conferences
seo.defaultDescription: Not a typical tech meetup. DevRelJam brings developer relations professionals together when major tech conferences are already in town.
seo.author: Yashraj Nayak
seo.ogImageAlt: DevRelJam brand card with event highlights

hero.headline: Developer Relations, in real conversations.
hero.subheadline: If world leaders can host important side meetings during UNGA, DevRel teams can definitely jam while they are already in town for major conferences.

about.title: What is DevRelJam?
about.body: DevRelJams are first-of-its-kind meetups for DevRel professionals. They are not standard tech meetups. They are practical, candid sessions where practitioners share both what worked and what did not, then leave with better judgment for the next initiative.
highlights: Conversations tailored for practitioners who have already operated DevRel programs
Small-group format that encourages honest takeaways
Hosted alongside major conferences so attendance is practical

speakers.description: Speaker submissions are open on a rolling basis for upcoming DevRelJams.

footer.note: DevRelJam is built for thoughtful DevRel practitioners who value craft over noise.
